options.name: --output
options.description: Output .pptx path. Defaults to the input file name with a .pptx extension.

options.name: --template
options.description: Existing .pptx template to copy masters/themes from before rendering slides.

options.name: --theme-css
options.description: CSS file to parse for Marp-style theme values.

options.name: --allow-remote-assets
options.description: Enable HTTP/HTTPS image downloads during rendering.

options.name: --write-slide-ids
options.description:
Add missing per-slide '<!-- slideId: ... -->' directives to the
input Markdown before rendering. Existing slideId directives are preserved.

options.name: --update-existing
options.description:
Reconcile against an existing MarpToPptx-generated deck instead of
rebuilding from scratch. Requires the previous deck path and preserves
manually added slides.

options.name: --contrast-warnings
options.description: Contrast warning mode: off, summary, or detailed.

options.name: --contrast-report
options.description: Write a detailed contrast audit report to a text file. Implies a contrast audit run.
